ie, with generative art I want to move between different seeds or generations of a piece of work as easily as someone manipulates layers in photoshop - I want to dive between multiverses and see which one has the best art and pull them back onto tue canvas

I don’t necessarily know what these words mean in this order, but I want a 5-dimensional AR art application to make and explore generative art / watercolors and alternatives across time and randomly generated outcomes

I think part of this is framing myself as a dataviz consultant- that is my specialty, but it often leads to being brought into a project way, way, way too late and I end up handcuffed by structural decisions made in the beginning

I can save you a lot more money if you bring me on in the beginning and let me help you architect and design a project or product– but people come to me like 2/3rds through their plan when they realize dataviz is actually really hard, and now I am cleaning up and triaging

People doing something I have done hundreds of times hire me to help, but only ask for help on specific things, never actually reaching the depth of knowledge/experience that gives me “value” - this happens a lot. I can definitely make you a bar chart, but uh…
